what_the_engine_actually_decides_on: the active champion's parameters (entry dip / target / stop / direction) plus the freshness and corrupt-feed gates. Nothing else is consulted at entry, exit, or champion selection.

peak_rhythm.role: per-name peak/trough rhythm — when to expect the next bounce
peak_rhythm.status: COMPUTED BUT IGNORED — not referenced by the live trading path

fingerprint.status: COMPUTED BUT IGNORED — not referenced by the live trading path

heat_tolerance.role: how much adverse heat a name tolerates before the thesis fails
heat_tolerance.status: COMPUTED BUT IGNORED — not referenced by the live trading path

heartbeat.status: COMPUTED BUT IGNORED — not referenced by the live trading path

dr_strange.status: COMPUTED BUT IGNORED — not referenced by the live trading path

edge_capture.role: edge-capture / repeat-striker engine (proven names like MKR)

lifecycle.status: COMPUTED BUT IGNORED — not referenced by the live trading path

verdict: 1/7 intelligence modules feed live decisions (edge_capture); 6 are computed but ignored: peak_rhythm, fingerprint, heat_tolerance, heartbeat, dr_strange, lifecycle. Until an ignored module is wired into the trading path, it does not affect a single trade.
